assertions.description: Isolation components ISOW7742 and ISO1640BDR not listed in isolation_components despite being the isolators bridging GND and PYRO_GND domains
SPI_SCK, SPI_MOSI, SPI_MISO appear in I2C results (same SPI-as-I2C false positive pattern)
REVIEW: Switching regulators TPS566242 (U303) and TPS564247 (U105) report input_rail and fb_net but no output_rail -- LDOs do have output_rail
